name: Dividends Received Deduction from 10-Percent Owned Foreign Corporations

eligibility.description: Domestic corporations owning at least 10% of a foreign corporation (excluding PFICs) where the foreign corporation has U.S. effectively connected income or dividends from 80%-owned domestic subs.

description: Allows a deduction for the U.S.-source portion of dividends received from a qualified 10-percent owned foreign corporation.
